description: Mirror-drift sync. FFBE -> FF6 link exists (wave 136); FF6 -> FFBE link missing (FFBE wasn't authored yet at FF6 time). Two FFTCG character-layer cohort nodes debuted in same Opus VIII set per same Square Enix press release; FFBE node explicitly cites FF6 as structural template. Sigh, mirror, done. Pure sync work — quality of the underlying edge already established at FFBE authorship.
